name: Hope
description_short: This is not a financial services company. The website is Merriam-Webster's dictionary definition of the word 'hope.' There is no actual company to profile.
description_long: The provided website URL (https://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/hope) is not a company website. It is the Merriam-Webster Dictionary entry for the word 'hope,' established in 1828 as a reference dictionary. The page contains only linguistic and etymological information about the English word 'hope,' including verb and noun definitions, synonyms, example sentences, word history dating to before the 12th century, and pronunciation guides. There is no financial services company, no lending products, no credit services, and no consumer finance operations of any kind present on this page. The content is purely educational and definitional in nature. This appears to be either a data entry error in the CreditDoc system, a test case, or a misclassification of a non-existent financial services entity. There is no business model, no service offerings, no pricing structure, and no customer base associated with this dictionary entry. Any attempt to categorize this as a payday alternative, credit service, or financial product provider would be factually incorrect and misleading to consumers seeking actual financial services.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)

typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
